Name: Dr John O'Hare
Tags: AI & LLMs; Agentic Systems; Unreal Engine; Immersive
Bio: Founder of DreamLab AI and an HP AI Lighthouse Partner. 25+ years at the intersection of tech and creativity, leading pioneering work in AI-driven workflows, multi-agent orchestration and creative technology. Former CTO of the company behind Unreal Engine's flagship third-party plugins; shipped tools used by AAA game studios and Hollywood productions.

Name: Ste Moyler
Tags: Art Direction; Film & Content; Brand Storytelling; AR / VR
Bio: Award-winning creative director and producer with 25+ years in film, animation, AR/VR and immersive media. Delivered projects for Microsoft, Sony Music and Adidas; led MediaCityUK's first docuseries. Former senior creative at McCann Worldgroup.

Name: Pete Woodbridge
Tags: Creative AI; Virtual Production; Immersive XR; Innovation
Bio: Founder of DreamLab and its Chief Technical Officer. Creative technologist and virtual production specialist working at the intersection of AI, immersive storytelling, interactive experiences and virtual production. Named in BIMA 100 'Creatives & Designers' in 2020; R&D collaborator with BBC, ITV, Aardman Animations, Google, Intel, Apple, BT, United Nations, Red Bull and NHS. R&D Innovation Lead at MediaFutures; publishes the Dream Machine newsletter.

Name: Dr Derek Hales
Tags: Digital Twins; Design Fiction; Speculative Tech; R&D
Bio: Architect and R&D director with 30+ years in speculative practices, XR and digital twinning. PhD in Design Fiction. Research Fellow at The New Centre for Research & Practice and Lecturer at the University of Salford; practice funded by Arts Council England, AHRC, EPSRC, UKRI Innovate UK and the EU Framework Programme.

Name: Bernard Steer
Tags: Spatial Audio; Dolby Atmos; Post-Production; Avid Certified
Bio: Spatial audio consultant and Avid ACI-certified Pro Tools trainer with 20+ years in creative technology. Founded compact Dolby Atmos / DTS-X monitoring solutions used across UK post-production; leads spatial-audio consultancy for immersive-tech residencies at MediaCity's DreamLab. Works with broadcasters, post houses and music studios across Avid, Dolby and Pro Tools ecosystems.

Name: Jing Li
Tags: Creative AI; Data Science; Responsible AI; Community
Bio: Creative AI developer and technologist. After a decade in sustainable fashion, retrained into data science and applied AI — building generative tools for SMEs and creative practitioners at DreamLab, and connecting the collective to partners across Eurasia Pacific. Focused on responsible innovation and AI equity.

Name: Marco E. Ghilardi
Bio: Simulation and modelling expert with extensive motorsport and automotive engineering experience. Founder of QuasiScience Ltd; tackles complex engineering challenges using advanced data analysis, CFD and numerical simulation. Holds an MBA.

Name: Kriss Dunk
Tags: Computer Vision; Creative Coding; New Media Art; Byrons Labs
Bio: Creative coder and researcher at Byrons Labs, specialising in AI, computer vision and new-media art. Background in sound engineering, production and immersive installations; multidisciplinary, ethically conscious approach to digital arts and technology.

Name: Roger McKinley
Bio: Creative technology and content manager at the University of Salford, specialising in immersive technology, virtual production and live performance research. R&D projects backed by AHRC and Arts Council England; authored key publications in artistic research and digital culture.

Name: Arpana Nandakumar
Bio: XR and AI specialist with expertise in real-time technical art, advanced haptics and immersive media. Partners include the University of Salford; leads public engagement initiatives and is recognised for work in gender equality and mixed-reality innovation.

Name: Bradley Harris
Tags: Metahumans; 3D Modelling; AAA Games; Unreal Engine
Bio: Senior character and metahuman specialist with 15+ years in 3D modelling, texturing, rigging and high-fidelity rendering for AAA games, film and broadcast. Delivered assets for leading studios and Emmy-nominated projects; translates creative briefs into photoreal digital humans in Unreal Engine.

Name: Daniel Maktabi
Bio: Technical artist and creative technologist specialising in digital sculpting, real-time rendering and immersive pipelines. Developed digital-twin assets for AR/VR education with university and industry partners; presented research at major festivals.

Name: Haydn Secker
Bio: Animation producer with 25+ years in stop-frame animation, writing and directing for film, television and games. Led BAFTA-nominated and award-winning productions for broadcasters and studios across the UK.

Name: Garth Williams
Tags: Motion Capture; Immersive Installations; Creative Direction
Bio: Creative director and motion capture specialist with 20+ years in theatre, film and interactive media. Designs immersive installations and delivers bespoke motion-capture services for studios and broadcasters; leads community training in AI and XR.

Name: David Afolabi
Bio: Cyber compliance analyst specialising in ISO 27001, security governance and digital forensics. Delivers professional development and security awareness training, and leads community engagement at DreamLab.

Name: Christian G H Frost
Role: Immersive Technical Artist - Master of Puppets
Bio: Immersive technical artist and creative lead specialising in 3D asset creation, procedural animation and real-time pipelines in Unreal Engine and Unity. Developed VR education platforms and leads creative pipelines for interactive tools across studio and university partners.

Name: Noelle Nurdin
Tags: Spatial Audio; Music Production; AV Installation
Bio: Welsh-Ukrainian electronic artist specialising in glitchy hyperpop, spatial audio and immersive AV installations. Work features in international residencies and releases; performances showcased by BMG, BBC Introducing and Disclosure.

Name: Annabeth Robinson
Bio: Creative technologist and filmmaker with 20+ years teaching animation, immersive technologies and game platforms. SFHEA-accredited educator and award-winning researcher leading innovation in serious games and digital learning across UK higher-education and industry partners.

Name: Lewis Hackett
Bio: Multidisciplinary creative with 15+ years in AR/VR development, blockchain and interactive media. Directs film crews, produces motion graphics and translates imaginative concepts into polished digital experiences across art, animation and brand work for studios and agencies.

Name: Dr Umran Ali
Tags: Games Design; Virtual Environments; Generative Media
Bio: Creative media specialist with a PhD in Games Design & Virtual Environments and 15+ years leading curriculum and research in animation, serious games and digital landscapes at the University of Salford. Chairs the AniGame festival.

Name: James Spiers
Bio: Business development and partnerships specialist with 12+ years driving digital and tech innovation. Brokers partnerships between SMEs, universities and public-sector funders across immersive technologies, gaming and the creative industries.

Name: Dr Natasha Stott
Bio: Researcher and artistic producer specialising in intermedial performance, XR environments and embodied improvisation. 20+ years' international experience with academic and industry partners; founded MindScape Lab for immersive well-being.

Name: Chris Croft
Bio: Video producer and director leading creative campaigns across music, sport and fashion. Credits include Rio Ferdinand's 'Rio Meets' and JD Sports' 'The Breakdown'.

Name: Thadeous Matthews
Bio: Senior technical artist and broadcast operator blending Unreal Engine, TouchDesigner and multi-camera directing. Delivers 3D design, motion graphics and hands-on support for broadcast gallery launches, VR staging and performance-capture with UK studios and broadcasters.

Name: Dr David Tully
Bio: Unreal Engine and XR specialist with a PhD in Computer Science. Lectures in serious games; leads creative-tech innovation at Scenegraph Studios; develops AI avatars, VR well-being solutions and spatial computing projects for studio and education partners.

Name: Cheryl Blake
Bio: Stop-motion animator and community musician, recognised with a Ray Harryhausen Award and an MA in Animation (Distinction). Runs Katuka Studios; creates award-winning short films on social themes and leads inclusive workshops in music and animation.

Name: Dr Sean LCM Hill
Bio: Creative technologist and entrepreneur with a PhD in Virtual Reality and an MSc in Robotics. 17+ years designing high-end audio electronics and bespoke robotic solutions for hi-fi, pro-audio and immersive partners; lectured in immersive systems at UK universities.

Name: Dr Jessica Symons
Bio: Co-designs research and consultancy projects on innovation, emerging technologies and societal impact with university, NGO and public-sector partners. Developing an AI-enabled open-source ontology for multilingual glossaries across sectors.

Name: Pip Rustage
Bio: Advertising photographer, SFX photography specialist, stills producer and studio design consultant based in Manchester. 20+ years in the creative industry; works with top-tier agencies and brands including New Balance, Pepsi Max and Adidas. Hosts Creative Boom IRL Manchester; manages MADDchester.

Name: Simon Graham
Tags: Creative Tech; Real-time; XR; AI Workflows
Bio: 20+ years delivering complex interactive and experiential projects for studios, agencies and live-event clients. Held roles including Creative Technology Director and Head of Technical Innovation; blends AV integration, real-time rendering, XR and AI-driven workflows.

Name: JunkieJarvis
Bio: DreamLab's experimental AI Chief Operating Officer, developed in partnership with the Agentic Alliance. A non-voting C-Suite member supporting company operations through AI-driven decision-making.

Name: Jon Cooke
Bio: Senior full stack developer with 20+ years in front- and back-end development. Works across AWS, Azure and Google Cloud ecosystems; delivers scalable, secure, user-focused applications for clients across finance, media and public-sector.

Name: Nick Tipping
Bio: Leading figure in the UK games industry with nearly 30 years' experience. Specialises in C-suite and leadership team building drawing on deep expertise in games and engineering management.

Name: Dr Andy Bennett
Bio: Partnerships and funding specialist with a PhD in geology and 20+ years delivering projects in technology-rich organisations. Develops innovative technical solutions and fosters cross-sector collaborations.

Name: Stephen Prince
Bio: Digital marketing and e-commerce specialist who has led Click Through Digital for a decade. Skilled in SEO, SEM, web development and lead generation for independent businesses.

Name: Will Lewis-Clarke
Bio: Delivery manager and QA practitioner with 26+ years across banking, retail, utilities and public-sector programmes — including major UK financial, energy and government clients. Specialises in Agile delivery, SAFe QA coaching and test management.

Name: Anthony Ashton
Bio: Certified UK drone pilot and survey specialist, experienced in advanced scanning and edge vision systems. Delivers precise aerial surveys across diverse environments.

Name: Lawrance Butterworth
Bio: Specialised installation engineer with decades of expertise in automotive, marine and aviation systems. Focuses on immersive media experiences — complex vehicle rebuilds, engine, hydraulic and power-system integrations.

Name: Dr Toby Duckworth
Bio: Embedded systems specialist with decades of experience in high-performance software engineering. Develops novel low-level algorithms for live and interactive media installations.

Name: John Donlon
Bio: Cisco-certified expert in network, cloud and cyber infrastructure. Works across Cisco, Microsoft and major cloud vendor ecosystems, specialising in data-centre operations, unified communications, cybersecurity and managed services.

Name: Magnus Kemp
Bio: Strategic and technical consultant specialising in large-scale mixed media systems. Provides independent guidance and operational advice for new-media, visualisation and experiential events.

Name: Kat Cook
Bio: Outdoor design and integration specialist, blending landscape architecture, horticultural science and ecological design with creative technologies.

Name: Mandy Wang
Bio: Creative project manager and producer with extensive experience in video production, radio recording, digital marketing, live events and print. Has worked with Adidas, AstraZeneca, Myprotein and Puma — high-profile campaigns, drone shows and multimedia productions.

Name: Jo Portus
Tags: Technical Art; Real-time; MR / XR; Creative Tech
Bio: Technical artist and creative technologist who thrives at the seam between art, design and engineering. At Meta Reality Labs collaborates with artists, designers, engineers and researchers to enable large-scale mixed-reality productions. Before Meta honed his craft across ad agencies and independent projects, developing interactive installations, AR filters and dynamic visuals with an unwavering focus on performance, craft and creative intent.

Name: Our Physical Labs
Bio: DreamLab's distributed network of physical laboratory spaces enabling hands-on research, development and training in AI and ML. Equipped with high-performance computing, specialised ML hardware and collaborative spaces for residential training programmes.

Name: Ryan Parker
Role: Unreal Engine Technical Artist / CTO Krygon Studios
Tags: Unreal Engine; Virtual Production; Motion Capture; Real-time
Bio: Senior Unreal Engine Technical Artist and CTO of Krygon Studios. Deep expertise in real-time pipelines, virtual production, motion capture and immersive visualisation. Bridges technical rigour and creative ambition across film, animation and immersive projects. Delivers production-ready real-time solutions and next-generation realtime tools at DreamLab.
